sections.label: 🔧 Refactor
items: Consolidated the 48 `@match` lines (24 path patterns × 2 domains) in the userscript header into 2 `@include` regex lines, mirroring the file's existing two `@include` lines used for MBID-entity pages. Also dropped `/cdstub/browse` as a `@match` entry since it was already a strict subset of `/cdstub/*`. No functional change — every page the script previously ran on, it still runs on.
